abilities.description: Target player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker. Delirium — If there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, instead that player sacrifices a creature and a planeswalker.

effect.description: Target player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker. Delirium — If there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, instead that player sacrifices a creature and a planeswalker.
